title: clutia rubricaulis var. tenuifolia
intro: Clutia rubricaulis var. tenuifolia, also known as Tenuifolia, is a variant of the Clutia rubricaulis plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clutia rubricaulis var. tenuifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially aiding in the management of certain health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, where it is used to treat various skin and respiratory conditions.
